name: VisualThemeFoundry
description: Offline dependency-free web UI theming utility: visually select and customize color themes, select fonts and styles, select icon sets, view with Material Design 3 components, and export a ready-to-use theme package for use in your projects.
author: Mike (Lead Designer) — Forge Code (Lead Programmer)
notes: Do not add dependency-manager manifest files.
Do not restore managed dependency folders; vendor approved utility sources in _imports.
Runtime remains framework-free Vanilla JavaScript generated from TypeScript sources.
